rows.label: tev024201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Percy about the provisional government.

rows.label: tev024201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Percy if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Percy about this district.

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Percy about the buildings of NLA.

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Percy about businesses.

rows.label: tev024201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Percy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0001
rows.name:
The provisional government is our
system of self- governance, headed
by Director General Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Don't tell me you thought that BLADE
was running this whole city by itself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0003
rows.name:
BLADE handles the fighting, but the
provisional government manages the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0004
rows.name: It's a very clear Union of duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Companion protect the city and also
serve police-like functions within it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0009
rows.name:
But there are some problems they
can't resolve without further help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0010
rows.name:
That said, I simply do not have the
manpower to resolve some of the more
minor grievances that are brought to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0011
rows.name:
It would be nice if there were good Samaritans
available who were willing to make the effort
to solve those sorts of problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0020
rows.name:
A lot of people cross through this area to go to the
commercial and residential districts instead of
following the proper route. It's becoming a problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Even after we had an elevator installed, there's
no end of people who would rather leap down
from the terrace in front of BLADE Tower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Sometimes people botch the landing and
hurt themselves, or end up taking a header
into the shock-absorbing gel below.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0023
rows.name:
They shouldn't be taking the protective
properties of Blue Bloods and ground
gear for granted like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0024
rows.name:
But I'm sure YOU always take the elevator
or transport like a proper [ST:gender p1=gentleman p2=lady ], right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Most of the buildings in this district are
being used for purposes other than the ones
for which they were originally intended.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0031
rows.name:
For example, BLADE Tower was originally
supposed to house government offices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0032
rows.name:
But Secretary Nagi and Commander
Vandham convinced the grumbling
bureaucrats to let BLADE use it instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0033
rows.name:
That's how the provisional
government ended up being moved
to this smaller building.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0039
rows.name:
In the original plan for NLA, a street of
office buildings was going to be built between
the commercial and administrative districts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Have you noticed the steady
growth that the arms manufacturers
have been experiencing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG0041
rows.name:
When this crisis ends, we'll
probably have to revise our
construction plans a second time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG1001
rows.name:
What happened with the situation at
Alesa's store? ...Oh, she decided to
serve Ma-non customers? That's good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG1002
rows.name:
I'm pleased that Alesa has come
to understand what it means to
do business on a new world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG1003
rows.name:
Hopefully the Ma-non will learn more about Earth's
clothing industry and incorporate that knowledge
into Ma-non businesses like Candid & Credible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024201_MSG1004
rows.name:
I know that company makes high-quality
ground gear, yet I can't say I'm
enthusiastic about their designs...[ST:wait ]
